features: Blog article publishing workflow with image migration

conventions: Footer requires secondaryLinks prop in footerData
Header action variant must be literal union (use as const if needed)
Ignore .astro generated files in Prettier via .prettierignore
gotchas: Duplicate content config file src/content/config.ts can trigger duplicate diagnostics
Astro check may show deprecated z hints from astro:content in current version; not a blocking error
Prettier check fails CI when generated .astro files are included
